lighting.shadow_character: Deep and dark shadows with minimal fill light, creating high contrast

composition.focus_point: Front picture frame or the space between the two frames

texture.detail_rendering: Excellent rendering of the frame's twisted shape and matte texture due to hard light

improvement_notes: For a high-end commercial look, control shadows with a reflector to reveal detail. Diffuse the light for a softer, more luxurious feel. Use a gray card for accurate white balance, and simplify the background to focus on the subject. Add complementary props to enhance the story.
nano_banana_prompt: Subject: A freshly baked croissant with flaky layers, placed on a minimalist off-white ceramic plate. Style: Food photography, close-up shot, eye-level view. Lighting: Bathed in intense, hard direct sunlight from a top-left window, creating long, crisp, and dramatic dark shadows on the right side. High contrast. Color & Mood: Vibrant and warm color palette, reminiscent of the golden hour. The scene has a cozy, lazy afternoon vibe. Kodak Portra 400 film aesthetic with rich colors and pleasing warmth. Details: Hyper-realistic details, sharp focus on the croissant's texture, clean and simple background. Minimalist composition.
